specific_mechanism: TATE-LORA: finite-group action + 2-cocycle representation + norm-map class + class-preserving constraint
llm_application: Identify a finite-group symmetry of the pretrained weights; represent the parameter-efficient update as a 2-cocycle on this symmetry; compute a 2-periodic invariant via norm-map; constrain training updates to preserve this invariant class.
novelty_claim: PiSSA/LoRA-GA use SVD-based linear init; this uses algebraic-topological invariant class.
